description.value:
You attempt to guide an ally into a more defensive pose against a particular danger. Attempt a @Check[warfare-lore] check against the hard DC for the level of a creature or hazard you can see. An ally of your choice within 30 feet gains an effect based on the outcome. If you're legendary in Warfare Lore, when you roll a failure or critical failure, you get a success instead.

Critical Success The ally gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the target creature's or hazard's next attack.

Success As critical success, but the bonus is +1.

Critical Failure The ally takes a –1 circumstance penalty to AC against the target creature's or hazard's next attack.
